headline: Seagate (STX) Stock Rallies As US Iran Ceasefire Lifts Memory Sector Mood
summary: A ceasefire in the US Iran conflict has been agreed, removing a major geopolitical risk for global markets. The peace deal includes reopening the Strait of Hormuz, easing previous concerns around energy and supply chain disruption. Memory and storage stocks, including Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX), have rallied on the news as investors reassess sector risk. The de escalation between the US and Iran immediately affects how investors look at Seagate Technology Holdings, a key...

headline: Western Digital Jumps 7% on Morgan Stanley’s 33% Price-Target Hike, Seagate Gains 5% as the AI Storage Boom Rolls On
summary: Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) stock is up 7% in Tuesday morning trading, changing hands near $701 and setting a fresh all-time high. The catalyst is a Morgan Stanley note that reiterated an Overweight rating and lifted its WDC price target by 33%. The upgrade extends a powerful run.
